title: Populate Files Column with Email Content
excerpt: It would be very helpful for my team to be able to have better integration between Gmail and Monday. Right now you can “email” a board, but any tasks or attachments sent in the email only show in the item’s conversation …

posts.author: HannahS (Hanna Smaglis)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful for my team to be able to have better integration between Gmail and Monday. Right now you can “email” a board, but any tasks or attachments sent in the email only show in the item’s conversation area.I’d like for attachments to auto-populate in the file column instead for easy visibility and access.
